name: Rating
description: RatingIcon (single glyph, star/heart x empty/half/full), Rating (aggregate read-only display, Only/Vertical/Horizontal alignments), RatingCell (single big selectable icon button), RatingBar (interactive 1-5 segmented selector, Emoji/Number/Star/Heart types), and RatingBarArea (RatingBar + feedback textarea).
sourceNote: Star uses RemixIcon's star-fill/star-line/star-half-fill directly. Heart has no half-heart glyph in RemixIcon, so its 'half' state uses a clipped fill-over-line overlay (clip-path: inset(0 50% 0 0)) instead. The 'Emoji' RatingBar type substitutes RemixIcon's emotion-sad/unhappy/normal/happy/laugh-line progression for Figma's raster emoji assets, per the RemixIcon-only policy. Rating's aggregate display genuinely computes full/half/empty counts from a continuous 0-5 `value`, not a fixed demo.
